---
title: ""
pagetitle: "Impact"
description: "Research impact and reach of Dr. Erika C. Freeman — publications, funding, collaboration, and public-facing work."
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
---

::: {.section-label}
Impact
:::
# impact {.section-title}

Research impact and reach across publications, funding, and collaboration.

::: {.impact-grid}

::: {.impact-block}
### Research impact & reach
::: {.impact-figure}
—
:::
Citations, h-index, and top-venue placements.
:::

::: {.impact-block}
### Research leadership
::: {.impact-figure}
—
:::
Grants, group, mentees, and working groups.
:::

::: {.impact-block}
### Citation growth
::: {.impact-figure}
—
:::
Citation trajectory over time.
:::

::: {.impact-block}
### Research pipeline
::: {.impact-figure}
5
:::
First-author papers currently in review or advanced preparation, from 23 papers total.
:::

::: {.impact-block}
### Global network
::: {.impact-figure}
—
:::
Collaborators across Cambridge, Eawag (ETH Domain), IGB, ICBM Oldenburg, Canadian Forest Service, Saskatchewan, Trent, and the WHONDRS consortium.
:::

::: {.impact-block}
### Public-facing work
::: {.impact-figure}
—
:::
Science Working Life essay (Ticking Clock, 2024), among Science's most-read essays of the year.
:::

:::
